creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
The "configure" step in building the GNUCASH port fails, yet the build
continues.  That is, failure of configure is not detected.

Also, the configure doesn't believe that the compiler works:

[root@onceler]# make configure
===>  Configuring for gnucash-1.3.4

/usr/bin/perl -pi.orig -e 's:/usr/lib/gnucash:/usr/local/lib/gnucash:g'   /u/onceler1/usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash/work/gnucash-1.3.4/src/quotes/gnc-prices
[root@onceler]#

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 
	

cd /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash
make configure

the post-configure step is run.  if you just type "make" it tries to
do the compile yet fails because configure did not complete.
